description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the aergus/latex Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage and executes the following script commands: find . -maxdepth 1 -type d -not -path '*/\.*' | grep "./" | while read line ; do echo $line ; cd "$line" ; xelatex slide.tex; xelatex slide.tex ; cd .. ; done; and then ls -R. Configure the job to publish any slide.pdf files located in any subdirectory as artifacts with the path pattern ./*/slide.pdf. No caches, services, variables, or special rules are required.
